prompts.best_for: Blame games, 'everyone thinks they're right', role confusion, team dynamics, 3-way finger-pointing scenarios
prompts.prompt: A high-resolution, photorealistic studio shot of three Spider-Man actors (resembling Tom Holland, Andrew Garfield, and Tobey Maguire) standing in a triangular formation, pointing fingers at each other in a circular blame gesture. The characters are wearing their distinct red and blue cinematic suits. The background is a seamless, neutral slate grey backdrop with soft studio lighting and floor shadows. The image mimics the famous Spider-Man Pointing meme format but with live-action movie quality. Overlay text areas: {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}} centered at the top, {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}} above the left figure, {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}} above the center figure, {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_4}} above the right figure. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Centered triangular composition. The headline text anchors the top, the figures form a visual triangle in the middle, creating a vertical symmetry.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. The Headline (sets the context). 2. The Visual (Spider-Man meme/pointing gesture). 3. The Labels (identifying the roles).
prompts.focal_point: The center of the image where the pointing fingers converge, specifically drawing the eye between the three faces and hands.
prompts.white_space: Generous negative space in the grey background allows the red costumes and white text to stand out without visual clutter.
prompts.balance: Symmetrical balance achieved through the triangular arrangement of the three figures, despite their slightly different poses.
prompts.positioning: Figures are centered horizontally. Headline text has approximately 80px top padding. Labels are positioned ~20px above heads.
prompts.shadows: Soft, diffused contact shadows beneath the boots on the floor (approx 15px spread, 30% opacity). No harsh cast shadows.
prompts.gradients: Background has a subtle radial gradient, lighter in the center  fading to slightly darker edges .
prompts.textures: Smooth fabric texture visible on the spandex suits; matte finish on the background.
prompts.heading: Segoe UI / Open Sans - Semibold - approx 48px
prompts.labels: Segoe UI / Open Sans - Regular - approx 24px

prompts.best_for: Expectation vs reality, budget comparisons, quality gaps, before/after contrasts, 2x2 grid humor
prompts.prompt: A 2x2 split-screen meme layout. Top-left quadrant: A hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D render of a Tyrannosaurus Rex in profile roaring, highly detailed skin texture, studio lighting with soft contact shadows on a white background. Bottom-left quadrant: A minimalist 8-bit pixel art T-Rex sprite (resembling the Chrome offline dinosaur), dark grey on a white background. Top-right quadrant: Clean white background containing large sans-serif text '{{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}' with the second word emphasized in blue. Bottom-right quadrant: Clean white background containing large sans-serif text '{{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}' with the second word emphasized in blue. Sharp black grid lines separating the four panels. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Standard 4-panel grid (2x2 matrix). The left column contains visual metaphors, while the right column contains explanatory labels.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Realistic T-Rex (Top Left) grabs initial attention due to complexity. 2. Text helps context. 3. Pixel T-Rex (Bottom Left) delivers the punchline. 4. Bottom text confirms the joke.
prompts.focal_point: The sharp contrast between the hyper-realistic dinosaur and the pixelated sprite.
prompts.white_space: Generous use of white space in the text panels ensures high readability. The background of the image panels is also white/neutral to isolate the subjects.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical visual weight. The top-left image is visually heavy and complex, while the bottom-left is light and minimal, reinforcing the concept of loss of quality/budget.
prompts.positioning: Text is optically centered within right-side quadrants. Images are centered horizontally. Grid lines are approximately 3-4px thick solid black.
prompts.shadows: Top T-Rex has a realistic, soft contact shadow to ground it. Bottom T-Rex has a flat, pixelated ground line with no real shadow processing.
prompts.gradients: None significantly used; flat design for text areas, realistic rendering for top image.
prompts.borders: Solid black  borders separating the four quadrants.
prompts.textures: Top image features high-fidelity skin textures (scales, wrinkles). Bottom image utilizes pixel-art aliasing.
prompts.heading: Oswald or Roboto Condensed - Bold / Regular mix - approx 64px

prompts.best_for: Motivational reactions, 'when you finally...', achievement moments, determination content, single-reaction memes
prompts.prompt: A classic internet meme format with a white background header and a rectangular image below. Top text in bold black sans-serif font reads: '{{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}'. The image depicts a cinematic still from a sports biopic featuring an athletic Indian male sprinter mid-stride on an outdoor running track. He has a bun hairstyle, wearing a white vintage running vest with 'INDIA' text and white shorts. The runner is captured in profile view moving left to right, displaying intense focus and muscular definition. The background shows a blurred stadium track with muted terracotta lanes and green grass. Natural daylight, realistic cinematic lighting. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Standard vertical meme stack: Text block (approx 20% height) placed above a content image (approx 80% height). Centered alignment.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. The text (sets the context/problem). 2. The runner's face and posture (provides the reaction/punchline). 3. The background details.
prompts.focal_point: The sprinter's intense facial expression and forward-leaning body posture.
prompts.white_space: Generous white space in the header area surrounds the text, isolating the caption for maximum readability. No white space within the image itself.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical due to the runner's forward momentum leaning right, but balanced by the centered, heavy text block above.
prompts.positioning: Text is center-aligned horizontally. Top padding approx 60px. Side margins approx 40px. Image is full width relative to the container logic.
prompts.shadows: No drop shadows on text (flat design). Natural lighting shadows in the photograph (soft shadows cast by the runner's legs on the track).
prompts.gradients: None in the graphic design elements. Natural lighting gradients on the runner's skin and muscles.
prompts.borders: Soft rounded corners on the main image container (approx 15px radius). No border strokes.
prompts.textures: Grainy film texture visible in the photograph, contrasting with the clean digital smoothness of the white background header.
prompts.heading: Arial or Helvetica - Bold - approx 42px
